justification: The diff successfully migrates from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) and updates Maven compiler settings to Java 21, but it does not utilize any Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads). The migration of test annotations (@Before -> @BeforeEach, @After -> @AfterEach) and assertions (Assert -> Assertions) is correct and clean. The pom.xml changes are coherent, updating dependencies and excluding transitive JUnit 4 from allure-junit4.
